mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rt.resourceTypeId AS classificationId, rt.typeName AS name, 'Type' AS kind, r.id AS resourceId, r.title AS relatedRecordName, COALESCE(r.updatedAt, r.createdAt) AS dateOfUse FROM resource r JOIN resourceType rt ON r.resourceTypeId = rt.resourceTypeId
UNION ALL
SELECT c.categoryId AS classificationId, c.categoryTopic AS name, 'Topic' AS kind, r.id AS resourceId, r.title AS relatedRecordName, COALESCE(r.updatedAt, r.createdAt) AS dateOfUse FROM resource r JOIN category c ON r.categoryId = c.categoryId ) classificationUsage ORDER BY classificationUsage.dateOfUse DESC, classificationUsage.resourceId DESC, classificationUsage.kind ASC

SELECT t.tagId, t.tagName, r.id AS resourceId, r.title AS relatedRecordName, COALESCE(r.updatedAt, r.createdAt) AS dateOfUse FROM resourceTag rt JOIN tag t ON rt.tagId = t.tagId JOIN resource r ON rt.resourceId = r.id ORDER BY dateOfUse DESC, r.id DESC, t.tagName ASC
